final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational infographic poster for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms period.

Style/medium: children's educational infographic, single large knowledge card format, cartoon storybook illustration style with friendly approachable visuals
Subject: the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) historical event, featuring key characters like Zhou Yu, Zhuge Liang, and Cao Cao in simplified cartoon forms
Composition: single large knowledge card layout, clear title at top, bullet-point key facts displayed in sidebar with punctuation marks, main illustration occupying central space showing the famous fire attack on chained ships
Scene/backdrop: Yangtze River battle scene with burning ships, simplified cartoon clouds and water, minimal background to keep focus on educational content
Lighting/mood: bright and cheerful daytime lighting, engaging and educational atmosphere suitable for children aged 6-12
Color palette: warm oranges and reds for fire elements, cool blues for water, friendly pastels for character clothing, high contrast for readability
Text (verbatim): "赤壁之战"
Constraints: all text must be large and legible for young readers; complex historical details simplified to child-friendly language; visual hierarchy guides eye from title to illustration to bullet points
Avoid: violent or scary imagery; overly complex battle details; small unreadable text; dark or ominous color schemes; realistic gore or death depictions
